  "reasoning": "We can't just throw money at the problem with funding_boost. Teacher_incentive is a no-brainer given the burnout index. Student_scholarship is crucial to reduce dropout_rate. Attendance_mandate might be a temporary fix, but I'd rather focus on resource_realloc to fundamentally shift the allocation of existing resources. I'm not convinced transparency_report will drive meaningful change. Staff_hiring is a priority, but not a full-court press given our current resource constraints. Counseling_programs are the key to tackling teacher burnout and student engagement.",
